script_text: Second graders are ready for lots of stories.
Short ones. Long ones. Funny and serious.
Mixing them up helps your reading grow.
This year you will meet chapter books.
Chapter books break the story into smaller pieces.
You can read one or two chapters a day!
Some books feel easy. That is great for practice.
Some books feel a little hard. Those are stretch books.
Stretch books make your reading stronger!
Find a reading spot. Read there every day.
Now you are ready to read stories all year!
